item.title: X-23 - Cosplay
item.description: Pulling this one out of the archives! My take on X-23 (very comic inspired) from quite a few years back. Figured this was a good one to revisit since Deadpool & Wolverine is all the rage right now :D I'm still so proud of myself for making that cool belt :P

item.title: I just learned about Tracey Stewart
item.description:
We all love Jon Stewart, but Tracey is really awesome too!
She wrote a very cool book about animals
This is them in 1998 just a few years after they met via a blind date in 1995
She was a veterinary technician but now she and Jon have started an animal sanctuary at their farm.
Here they are with a new lamb addition to the sanctuary.

item.title: Sarah's Golden Smile after Winning Gold. :)
item.description: American wrestler Sarah Hildebrandt breaks through to win Olympic gold after falling short in 2020 “I love this sport,” Hildebrandt said after the win. “It’s so much fun. I’m going to smile as much as I can. I think I did a great job of that this week.” Known for her signature smile after matches, Hildebrandt’s exuberance after her victory was undeniable as she became the second member of the United States wrestling team to win gold after 20-year-old Amit Elor was the first on Tuesday at 68kg. https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/8/7/24215609/american-wrestler-sarah-hildebrandt-breaks-through-to-win-olympic-gold-medal-after-2020-bronze #olympics
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: "But, you don't have to take MY word for it."
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Goddamnit, Elmo: Musk’s troubled pro-Trump PAC is now being investigated by two swing states after appearing to scrape voters’ data
item.description: (Getty Images, Grazie) Two swing states are investigating Elon Musk’s new political action committee (PAC), the America PAC, for potentially defrauding voters. Officials from North Carolina and Michigan—two battleground states in the upcoming presidential election—have said they are looking into America PAC after a CNBC report showed the PAC collected data from people in swing states under the guise of registering them to vote but never actually registered them. Before CNBC’s reporting, America PAC's website had a large button on its homepage that read, “Register to Vote.” If a hopeful voter clicked that button, the site then prompted them to enter their email address and ZIP code. If they entered a ZIP code from a state considered non-competitive, such as California or Tennessee, it would direct them to that state’s official voter registration page. But if a user entered a ZIP code from a battleground state, they would then be prompted to answer a page full of detailed personal questions, such as the exact address of their home, phone number, and age. After completing the questionnaire, the user would receive a “Thank You!” page, never having been led to register, despite handing over valuable personal information. The “Register to Vote” button, at the time of writing, is gone from the America PAC website. The North Carolina Board of Elections told CNBC on Monday it has opened an investigation of Musk's America PAC after it received a complaint. "North Carolina law makes it a crime for someone to fail to submit a voter's registration form if that person has told a voter that they would be submitting the voter's registration form," the board's spokesman, Patrick Gannon, told CNBC. It is unclear if Musk’s PAC was making that exact claim, that it would submit a voter’s registration form, by collecting the data or by having a button called “register to vote.” Brett Swearingin, an attorney at Michigan firm Miller Johnson, said that after reviewing North Carolina’s statute on this issue, he didn’t believe the website violated the law, because it didn’t claim to register voters with the official registration form. “When you're dealing with the law, there are things that sound dubious or shady, and then there’s when something actually violates a law,” Swearingin said. “And the way that this statute is written, it seems very clear that they're only dealing with the particular form that has been promulgated by the state board of elections.” https://finance.yahoo.com/news/elon-musk-troubled-pro-trump-211522044.html #EatTheRich #FuckElmo #ElectionInterference
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1087 (human-like behavior)
item.description:
Good morning. I actually slept sorta well, despite waking up in the middle of a dream, so the world will find me especially problematic today. Let's get this bread.
I mean, I did get some anxiety in too. But the message of the dream was when someone offers me help, I should take it.
Especially hilarious because unlike some of my coworkers who also dress like cowboys, I carry a giant bowie knife instead of a gun. The knife is more useful for adjusting mirrors, anyway.
Gotta love a good Civ VI meme.
It's okay to seek help if you're contemplating suicide. People do love and care about you. Get help. The world would suck without your Meme posts. Survive, please.
Oops this is here twice
My coffee today is light roast, fair-trade, locally roasted coffee sourced from Rwanda and it is magical and delicious.
Elf is how you say 11 in German.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning! Hey cutie! WHATDOIN?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Thursday unhinged meme dump of pure chaos #253 (hang in there, weekend is coming soon)
item.description:
1
2. MRW my boss tells me that there has been a sick call on the late shift...
3. How do I be as smooth as this guy? Send tutorials please
4. LANGUAGE
5. Cat getting bullied by bird
6
7. When you beat the game and you're just looking for ways to make it fun again
8
9. Accurate
10. This is why I don't go fishing in Florida
11. Netflixsssss and Chill
12
13. Can't stop watching
14
15. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Here is a funny sign from the game (and helpful life advice)
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: About damn time
item.description: Did a psych eval with new doc. Reaffirmed diagnoses of severe ADD, GED and depression. Taking antidepressant and anti anxiety meds and holy crap there’s a huge difference just a couple weeks in!

treet?
